title: Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Water}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Mulako Corporation
Primordial Water Quarry |region=[[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry in grid square N-14, which, according to ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', is located in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. |sector= |system=[[Unidentified star system (Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry)|Star system]][[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] |coordinates=N-14''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |xyz= |distance= |suns=[[Unidentified star (Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry)|Orange star]] |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear=100 [[Standard year/Legends|years]]{{CSWECite|II|341|Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry}} |class=Long-term [[Time/Legends|periodic]] [[Comet/Legends|comet]] |diameter= |atmosphere=*Coma of [[Gas/Legends|gas]] particles and ions *[[Atmosphere/Legends|Breathable]] (near perihelion) |climate=*[[Temperature/Legends|Cold]] (far from perihelion) *Warm (near perihelion) |gravity=Low |terrain= |water=[[Water/Legends|Ice]] |interest=*Resorts *[[Restaurant/Legends|Restaurants]] *Lounges |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports=Water |affiliation=[[Mulako Corporation]] }} {{Quote|This is the Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry. A long-term periodic comet that comes back every century or so. Right now it's near its closest approach to the sun, and we're at high tourist season.|Luke Skywalker, to Callista Ming|}} The '''Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry''', also known as '''Mulako Corporation Quarry''', '''Mulako Corporation comet''', '''MC Quarry''', and '''Mulako quarry''', was a [[Comet/Legends|comet]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] its [[Unidentified star (Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry)|star]] once every [[Standard century/Legends|hundred years]]. For the greater part of this [[Time/Legends|period]], the [[Mulako Corporation]] [[Mining/Legends|mined]] [[Water/Legends|ice]] on the comet's surface, extracting pure water from it and selling it to gourmets. When the Mulako Corporation Quarry approached its perihelion and became habitable as a result, the company opened luxurious resorts on the comet for a few [[Standard month/Legends|months]], and tourists visited the [[Temperature/Legends|warm]] and humid facilities, with several tourist attractions being available both inside and on the surface. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Callista Ming]] visited the Mulako Corporation Quarry in hopes of restoring Ming's lost [[Force-sensitive/Legends|connection]] to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. The Jedi stayed for a while at one of the resort facilities, where they were discreetly observed by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Randa Besadii Diori]] before leaving the comet to continue their efforts elsewhere. ==Description== {{Quote|Close to perihelion, the comet becomes one of the most exclusive resorts in this sector. The climate heats up, enough of the volatiles evaporate from the ice to form a breathable atmosphere, and people can live inside the snowball. It's very unusual.|Luke Skywalker|}} The [[Mulako Corporation]] Primordial Water Quarry, also known as Mulako Corporation Quarry, MC Quarry, Mulako Corporation comet, and simply as Mulako quarry, was a long-term [[Time/Legends|periodic]] [[Comet/Legends|comet]] with an irregular shape and low [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]]. The comet [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] an average–sized [[Unidentified star (Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry)|orange star]], located in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], once every [[Standard century/Legends|hundred years]]. The comet contained pure [[Water/Legends|water]] that traced its origin back to the formation of the [[Unidentified star system (Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry)|star system]] in which it was located. [[Gas/Legends|Gas]] [[Geyser/Legends|geysers]] on Mulako Corporation Quarry's tarnished surface expelled volatile gases into [[Realspace/Legends|space]], leading to the formation of a coma and a long tail along the comet's orbit. The coma contained gas particles and ions that could scintillate against the [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] of [[Starship/Legends|starships]], causing static over their [[Comm unit/Legends|comm systems]]. The cometary ice crust also contained rock inclusions. When the Mulako quarry neared its closest approach to its [[Star/Legends|sun]] and became [[Temperature/Legends|warmer]], enough gas evaporated from the ice to form a breathable [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. As a result, the inside of the comet became habitable during these few [[Standard month/Legends|months]]. As the water quarry comet came closer still to its perihelion, it became unstable due to increased gas evaporation, eruption of new geysers, and a small possibility of splitting apart due to active [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations on the comet's surface and interior. When the comet moved away from its star into deep space, it became colder and the gases froze out, forming new layers of ice. ==History== {{Quote|I just happened to be visiting the Mulako Corporation Quarry when Skywalker—traveling incognito—showed up in the company of a slender, short-haired human female who seemed to be his paramour.|Randa Besadii Diori|''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''}} [[File:CallistaLuke.jpg|thumb|250px|Luke Skywalker and Callista Ming visited the Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry in 12 ABY.]] In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] made reservations at one of Mulako quarry's resort facilities for himself and fellow Human [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Callista Ming]] in order to rekindle Ming's lost [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force sensitivity]]. They traveled incognito on an [[Unidentified space yacht|unmarked space yacht]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to the comet and arrived during the tourist season of the local resorts. At the same time, the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Randa Besadii Diori]] was also visiting the Mulako quarry and noticed Skywalker and Ming. After Ming made an unsuccessful attempt at [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinesis]] and a [[Standard day/Legends|night]] spent in the resort, the pair left the comet for the planet [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] to continue their attempts at reestablishing Ming's connection to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. ==Inhabitants== {{Quote|The selling point of this resort is its transience. The Mulako Corporation mines it out each orbit as the comet hooks toward the sun and becomes habitable. They reinstall the facilities, open it to tourists for a few months, then close down again as the comet gets too close to the sun, where it becomes unstable with too much gas evaporating, new geysers erupting, even a small possibility that the iceball will split apart from all the mining and tunneling. Then, when the comet races away from the sun and the gases begin to freeze out, there's another several-month period when the resort is dug out again and reopened. When it finally becomes too cold, the quarry is closed to the public, and the mining company operates for the next hundred years out in deep space, strip-mining the newly deposited layers of ice.|Luke Skywalker|}} For roughly a period of one hundred years during each of the comet's orbits, the Mulako Corporation used machines to strip-mine water ice on the Mulako quarry—both on the surface and in the interior. The ice was stored and distilled, and the resulting pure water was sold at a high price to important officials and gourmets, with the company advertising the fact that the water had never been recycled through organic life forms. As the water quarry comet approached its perihelion, however, the Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry became one of the most exclusive resort sites in its [[Galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. The company reinstalled the resort facilities and opened them to tourists for a few months, then closed them down as the comet became unstable due to close proximity to its star. Then, as the comet began to move away from the sun again, the resorts were dug out and re-opened for a few more months. Finally, when it became too cold on the comet, the facilities were closed, and the company returned to ice mining again. ==Locations== {{Quote|According to the brochures, there's plenty of things to do here. We could explore the tunnels, or suit up and go out to the surface. The low gravity makes it fun to jump around. Or we could see one of the erupting gas geysers. Those are supposed to be quite spectacular.|Luke Skywalker, to Callista Ming|}} The Mulako Corporation had built several resort facilities on the comet, along with various [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurants]] and lounges. The warm and damp interior of the resorts featured curving corridors; tropical [[Cave/Legends|caverns]]; and spacious suites with fountains, waterfalls, and polymerized frozen walls. The company used rocks found on the comet to create original furniture of various sizes and shapes. The comet's vapors were intentionally turned into a humidifying mist. This allowed for [[Color/Legends|orange]] and yellow lights to be shined through the omnipresent mists for visual effects, and multicolored [[glow-lamp]]s were also installed in Skywalker and Ming's suite. The facility that Skywalker and Ming visited used [[Service droid/Legends|porter droids]] to carry the luggage of new arrivals. As an alternative to staying in the resort facilities, tourists could also explore the tunnels created in the mining process, as well as the naturally occurring gas geysers. Visiting starships on the Mulako Corporation Quarry were guided to a cavern–like portal that was surrounded by yellow, purple, red, and black marker lights. The lights were transmitted for the benefit of Mulako Corporation's customers whose [[Eye/Legends|eyesight]] was attuned to various portions of the spectrum. ==Behind the scenes== The Mulako Corporation Primordial Water Quarry first appeared in the [[1995]] novel [[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']], written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]]. The [[2012]] reference book ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' placed the Mulako Corporation comet in grid square N-14. According to the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', parts of both the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] and the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] regions of the galaxy are located in that grid square; however, sources did not establish which of these regions contained the Mulako quarry.''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Appearances== *[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Comets]] [[Category:Trailing Sectors locations]]
